title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 22 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 22 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 22 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/07/2025
Today, the iron ore futures continued their strong upward trend, with the most-traded contract I2509 surging to 835.5 in the afternoon before pulling back to closeat 823, marking a daily gain of 2.49%. Traders were actively offloading positions, while speculative trading remained weak. Some steel mills purchased as needed, but most adopted a cautious wait-and-see approach, with weak purchase willingness.
